
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np


```


```{python}
url = 'https://github.com/fivethirtyeight/data/raw/master/star-wars-survey/StarWars.csv'
df = pd.read_csv(url, encoding="ISO-8859-1")

seen_columns = df.columns[1:7]  # Columns 2 to 7 contain responses about seeing the movies
gender_column = df.columns[33]  # Replace 'gender_index' with the actual index

# Convert responses to boolean (Yes -> True, No or NaN -> False)
df_seen = df[seen_columns].applymap(lambda x: x == "Yes")

df_male = df[df[gender_column] == "Male"]

# Identify male respondents who have seen at least one movie
seen_at_least_one_male = df_male[seen_columns].applymap(lambda x: x == "Yes").any(axis=1)

# Calculate percentage
percentage_seen_male = seen_at_least_one_male.mean() * 100

# Print result to four decimal places
print(f"{percentage_seen_male:.4f}%")
```
